title: Oerlikon
text:
today I was thinking zin ideas and I thought of a really good one, which is a zin-podcast where I draw a character and they talk with each other but they are printed on the transparent paper. I will develop this idea here I will also attach my sketch.

On Today I was listening to the song

by Arcade Fire. Something about this song weirdly touches me! It's like I'm in 2012 once more, eating an orange, guys.

 The video is not connected to this note but take it as it is. It is a nice video.
